member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.DTOs.CncInstructionDto
member.summary: Represents a single CNC machining instruction associated with a component. Operation: e.g. Bore, Groove, Route. Note: max 2000 chars.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.DTOs.CncInstructionDto.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Decimal},System.Nullable{System.Decimal},System.Nullable{System.Decimal},System.String)
member.summary: Represents a single CNC machining instruction associated with a component. Operation: e.g. Bore, Groove, Route. Note: max 2000 chars.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.DTOs.CuttingLineDto
member.summary: Represents a single line item in a cutting sheet — one component to be cut. ComponentName: max 100 chars. CanRotate: allow 90 degree rotation in nesting.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.DTOs.CuttingLineDto.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.String,System.Decimal,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Represents a single line item in a cutting sheet — one component to be cut. ComponentName: max 100 chars. CanRotate: allow 90 degree rotation in nesting.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.DTOs.CuttingOffcutResultDto
member.summary: Represents a resulting offcut from a cutting operation (Cutting-side ownership).

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.DTOs.CuttingOffcutResultDto.#ctor(System.String,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Guid)
member.summary: Represents a resulting offcut from a cutting operation (Cutting-side ownership).

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.DTOs.CuttingSheetDto
member.summary: Output DTO representing a complete cutting sheet. TenantId present as read-only (SEC-01 output side). ContentHash is a SHA-256 hash of the sheet content for audit/immutability verification.
Output DTO representing a complete cutting sheet. TenantId present as read-only (SEC-01 output side). ContentHash is a SHA-256 hash of the sheet content for audit/immutability verification.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.DTOs.ExecutionStatusDto
member.summary: Current shop-floor execution status of a cutting sheet.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.DTOs.ExecutionStatusDto.#ctor(System.Guid,SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Enums.CuttingExecutionStatus,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset},System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset})
member.summary: Current shop-floor execution status of a cutting sheet.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.DTOs.NestingResultDto
member.summary: Aggregated result of the nesting optimization run for a cutting sheet.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.DTOs.NestingResultDto.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.DTOs.PanelAssignmentDto},System.Decimal,System.Int32)
member.summary: Aggregated result of the nesting optimization run for a cutting sheet.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.DTOs.PanelAssignmentDto
member.summary: Describes which pieces are placed on a single stock panel after nesting.
Describes which pieces are placed on a single stock panel after nesting.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.DTOs.PlacedPieceDto
member.summary: Represents the physical placement of a cutting piece on a panel after nesting. CuttingLineIndex links back to the source CuttingLineDto (CD-09).

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.DTOs.PlacedPieceDto.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Represents the physical placement of a cutting piece on a panel after nesting. CuttingLineIndex links back to the source CuttingLineDto (CD-09).

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.DTOs.ProcessStepDto
member.summary: Represents a single production process step attached to a cutting sheet.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.DTOs.ProcessStepDto.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Represents a single production process step attached to a cutting sheet.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.DTOs.WasteByMaterialDto
member.summary: Waste breakdown for a single material within a waste report.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.DTOs.WasteByMaterialDto.#ctor(System.String,System.Decimal,System.Decimal)
member.summary: Waste breakdown for a single material within a waste report.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.DTOs.WasteReportDto
member.summary: Aggregated waste report for a given time window across all cutting operations.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.DTOs.WasteReportDto.#ctor(System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.DTOs.WasteByMaterialDto})
member.summary: Aggregated waste report for a given time window across all cutting operations.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Enums.CuttingExecutionStatus
member.summary: Represents the execution lifecycle state of a cutting sheet on the shop floor.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Enums.CuttingExecutionStatus.Planned
member.summary: The sheet has been scheduled but execution has not started.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Enums.CuttingExecutionStatus.InProgress
member.summary: Cutting is currently in progress.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Enums.CuttingExecutionStatus.Completed
member.summary: Cutting completed successfully.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Enums.CuttingExecutionStatus.Failed
member.summary: Cutting failed; see associated CuttingFailed event for the reason.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Enums.CuttingSheetStatus
member.summary: Represents the workflow state of a cutting sheet from submission to completion.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Enums.CuttingSheetStatus.Received
member.summary: The sheet has been received and accepted.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Enums.CuttingSheetStatus.Queued
member.summary: The sheet is queued for nesting.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Enums.CuttingSheetStatus.InNesting
member.summary: Nesting optimization is running.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Enums.CuttingSheetStatus.Nested
member.summary: Nesting has been completed; the sheet is ready for execution.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Enums.CuttingSheetStatus.InExecution
member.summary: Physical cutting is in progress.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Enums.CuttingSheetStatus.Completed
member.summary: Cutting has been completed successfully.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Events.CuttingCompleted
member.summary: Raised when physical cutting of a sheet has been completed on the shop floor.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Events.CuttingCompleted.SheetId
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the completed cutting sheet.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Events.CuttingCompleted.OperatorId
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the operator who completed the cutting.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Events.CuttingCompleted.OffcutIds
member.summary: Gets the identifiers of offcut stock items registered after cutting.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Events.CuttingFailed
member.summary: Raised when cutting of a sheet has failed on the shop floor. Reason: max 2000 chars.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Events.CuttingFailed.SheetId
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the cutting sheet that failed.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Events.CuttingFailed.Reason
member.summary: Gets the human-readable failure reason. Max 2000 characters.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Events.CuttingSheetReceived
member.summary: Raised when a cutting sheet has been successfully received and accepted by the provider.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Events.CuttingSheetReceived.SheetId
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the accepted cutting sheet.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Events.CuttingSheetReceived.SourceEntityId
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the source entity that submitted the sheet.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Events.CuttingSheetReceived.SourceModuleType
member.summary: Gets the name of the module type that submitted the sheet.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Events.NestingCompleted
member.summary: Raised when nesting optimization has completed for a cutting sheet.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Events.NestingCompleted.SheetId
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the cutting sheet that was nested.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Events.NestingCompleted.PanelsUsed
member.summary: Gets the number of stock panels consumed by the nesting run.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Events.NestingCompleted.WastePercentage
member.summary: Gets the overall waste percentage (0–100) achieved by nesting.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.ICuttingProvider
member.summary: Contract for cutting services. Implementations: SpaceOS built-in, OptiCut, CutRite, manual. TenantId is NOT in request DTOs — the implementation resolves it from JWT (SEC-01). Consumer MUST verify Capabilities before calling optional methods (SEC-05).

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.ICuttingProvider.SubmitCuttingSheetAsync(SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Requests.SubmitCuttingSheetRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Submits a new cutting sheet for processing. Requires capability.
member.returns: The new cutting sheet identifier on success.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.ICuttingProvider.GetCuttingSheetAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a cutting sheet by its identifier.
member.returns: The cutting sheet DTO on success.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.ICuttingProvider.GetCuttingSheetsBySourceAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Queries all cutting sheets produced for a given source entity. Needed by Joinery and Cabinet modules (BE-01).
member.returns: All cutting sheets for the entity.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.ICuttingProvider.GetNestingResultAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves the nesting result for a cutting sheet. Requires capability.
member.returns: The nesting result on success.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.ICuttingProvider.GetExecutionStatusAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves the current shop-floor execution status of a cutting sheet. Requires capability.
member.returns: The execution status on success.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.ICuttingProvider.GetWasteReportAsync(System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a waste report for the specified time window. Requires capability. Max 5s response time (BE-02).
member.returns: The aggregated waste report on success.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.ICuttingProvider.SubmitAnonymousSheetAsync(SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Requests.AnonymousSheetRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Submits a cutting sheet from an anonymous or partner channel. Requires capability (SEC-05). v1: DIM throws NotSupportedException — providers opt-in by overriding. v1.5 (FreeTier): CuttingProviderHttpAdapter overrides with synthetic tenant context.
member.param: The anonymous sheet request including channel metadata.
member.returns: The new cutting sheet identifier on success.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Requests.AnonymousSheetRequest
member.summary: Request DTO for anonymous or partner cutting sheet submissions. Wraps with channel metadata. Sheet: the cutting sheet input (same structure as authenticated flow). Source: the channel — MUST NOT be Direct (use SubmitCuttingSheetAsync for Direct flows). PartnerId: required when Source is Partner, null otherwise (SEC-11). BrandingContextId: optional partner branding configuration reference. SessionFingerprint: IP hash for rate-limiting; NOT stored in audit trail; max 128 chars; no PII (SEC-07).

remarks.para: SEC-10: Lines ≤ 50 (vs 200 for authenticated). Server-side enforced.
SEC-11: When Source is Partner, PartnerId MUST be a registered UUID. 403 on unknown.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Requests.AnonymousSheetRequest.#ctor(SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Requests.SubmitCuttingSheetRequest,SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.SourceChannel,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.String)
member.summary: Request DTO for anonymous or partner cutting sheet submissions. Wraps with channel metadata. Sheet: the cutting sheet input (same structure as authenticated flow). Source: the channel — MUST NOT be Direct (use SubmitCuttingSheetAsync for Direct flows). PartnerId: required when Source is Partner, null otherwise (SEC-11). BrandingContextId: optional partner branding configuration reference. SessionFingerprint: IP hash for rate-limiting; NOT stored in audit trail; max 128 chars; no PII (SEC-07).

remarks.para: SEC-10: Lines ≤ 50 (vs 200 for authenticated). Server-side enforced.
SEC-11: When Source is Partner, PartnerId MUST be a registered UUID. 403 on unknown.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.Requests.SubmitCuttingSheetRequest
member.summary: Input DTO for submitting a cutting sheet. TenantId is NOT included — resolved from JWT (SEC-01). Max constraints: Lines le 200, CncInstructions le 500, ProcessSteps le 50 (SEC-02). ComponentName le 100 chars, MaterialCode le 20 chars (SEC-04). ParameterOverridesJson le 10KB.

Input DTO for submitting a cutting sheet. TenantId is NOT included — resolved from JWT (SEC-01). Max constraints: Lines le 200, CncInstructions le 500, ProcessSteps le 50 (SEC-02). ComponentName le 100 chars, MaterialCode le 20 chars (SEC-04). ParameterOverridesJson le 10KB.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.DTOs.ConsumptionTrendDto
member.summary: Consumption trend analysis for a single material over a given time window. EstimatedDaysUntilStockout is nullable — computed value, may be unavailable (CD-10). Null when insufficient data or stock is at zero.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.DTOs.ConsumptionTrendDto.#ctor(System.String,System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Consumption trend analysis for a single material over a given time window. EstimatedDaysUntilStockout is nullable — computed value, may be unavailable (CD-10). Null when insufficient data or stock is at zero.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.DTOs.MaterialDto
member.summary: Master data record describing a material type in the system. Code: max 20 chars. Unit: e.g. m2, pcs, m. Null if not applicable.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.DTOs.MaterialDto.#ctor(System.String,System.String,SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.MaterialCategory,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.String)
member.summary: Master data record describing a material type in the system. Code: max 20 chars. Unit: e.g. m2, pcs, m. Null if not applicable.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.DTOs.ReservationDto
member.summary: Read model representing a soft stock reservation. Id: unique identifier of the reservation. TenantId: tenant that owns this reservation. CorrelationId: consumer-provided idempotency key. ConsumerModule: registered consumer module that created the reservation. ConsumerContextJson: optional structured context provided by the consumer at creation time. CreatedByUserId: user identity that created the reservation, if available. CreatedAt: UTC timestamp when the reservation was created. ExpiresAt: UTC timestamp after which the reservation expires if not consumed. Status: current lifecycle status of the reservation. Items: reserved line items; contains at least one item.

Read model representing a soft stock reservation. Id: unique identifier of the reservation. TenantId: tenant that owns this reservation. CorrelationId: consumer-provided idempotency key. ConsumerModule: registered consumer module that created the reservation. ConsumerContextJson: optional structured context provided by the consumer at creation time. CreatedByUserId: user identity that created the reservation, if available. CreatedAt: UTC timestamp when the reservation was created. ExpiresAt: UTC timestamp after which the reservation expires if not consumed. Status: current lifecycle status of the reservation. Items: reserved line items; contains at least one item.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.DTOs.ReservationFilter
member.summary: Filter criteria for querying reservations via IInventoryProvider.GetReservationsAsync. At least one filter property must be non-null/non-default — empty filter is rejected as a DoS guard. Maximum Take is 500. ConsumerModule: optional filter by consumer module name. Status: optional filter by reservation lifecycle status. CorrelationId: optional filter by exact consumer-provided correlation ID. CreatedAfter: optional — returns only reservations created on or after this UTC timestamp. CreatedBefore: optional — returns only reservations created on or before this UTC timestamp. Skip: pagination offset (default 0). Take: page size (default 100, max 500).

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.DTOs.ReservationFilter.#ctor(System.String,System.Nullable{SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.ReservationStatus},System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset},System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Filter criteria for querying reservations via IInventoryProvider.GetReservationsAsync. At least one filter property must be non-null/non-default — empty filter is rejected as a DoS guard. Maximum Take is 500. ConsumerModule: optional filter by consumer module name. Status: optional filter by reservation lifecycle status. CorrelationId: optional filter by exact consumer-provided correlation ID. CreatedAfter: optional — returns only reservations created on or after this UTC timestamp. CreatedBefore: optional — returns only reservations created on or before this UTC timestamp. Skip: pagination offset (default 0). Take: page size (default 100, max 500).

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.DTOs.ReservationItemDto
member.summary: A single reserved line item within a . Id: unique item identifier. StockItemId: identifier of the reserved stock item. MaterialCode: material code of the reserved stock. QuantityReserved: quantity held; always greater than zero (I-06). QuantityConsumed: quantity consumed so far; never exceeds QuantityReserved (I-07).

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.DTOs.ReservationItemDto.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.String,System.Decimal,System.Decimal)
member.summary: A single reserved line item within a . Id: unique item identifier. StockItemId: identifier of the reserved stock item. MaterialCode: material code of the reserved stock. QuantityReserved: quantity held; always greater than zero (I-06). QuantityConsumed: quantity consumed so far; never exceeds QuantityReserved (I-07).

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.DTOs.StockItemDto
member.summary: Represents a single stock item (full panel or offcut) in the inventory system.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.DTOs.StockItemDto.#ctor(System.Guid,System.String,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.StockItemType,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Represents a single stock item (full panel or offcut) in the inventory system.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.DTOs.StockLocationDto
member.summary: Represents a named storage location within the warehouse.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.DTOs.StockLocationDto.#ctor(System.Guid,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Represents a named storage location within the warehouse.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.DTOs.StockMovementDto
member.summary: Records a single stock quantity change for audit and ledger purposes. Quantity is positive for inbound movements; negative for consumption/scrap.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.DTOs.StockMovementDto.#ctor(System.Guid,SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.StockMovementType,System.Int32,SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.StockReferenceType,System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Records a single stock quantity change for audit and ledger purposes. Quantity is positive for inbound movements; negative for consumption/scrap.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.MaterialCategory
member.summary: Top-level material classification used for reporting and purchasing rules.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.MaterialCategory.Board
member.summary: Structural board panels (MDF, chipboard, plywood, solid wood).

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.MaterialCategory.Edge
member.summary: Edge banding strips.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.MaterialCategory.Veneer
member.summary: Veneer sheets or rolls.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.MaterialCategory.Hardware
member.summary: Hardware items (hinges, handles, drawer systems, etc.).

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.MaterialCategory.Adhesive
member.summary: Adhesives and glues.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.MaterialCategory.Other
member.summary: Any material that does not fit the above categories.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.ReservationStatus
member.summary: Lifecycle status of a soft stock reservation.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.ReservationStatus.Active
member.summary: Reservation is active and stock is held.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.ReservationStatus.Released
member.summary: Reservation was explicitly released by the consumer.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.ReservationStatus.Expired
member.summary: Reservation expired because the TTL elapsed without consumption.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.ReservationStatus.Consumed
member.summary: Reservation was fully consumed via RecordConsumptionAsync.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.StockItemType
member.summary: Distinguishes whether a stock item is a full-size panel or a reusable offcut.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.StockItemType.FullPanel
member.summary: A full, uncut panel as received from the supplier.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.StockItemType.Offcut
member.summary: A remaining piece produced as a by-product of a previous cutting operation.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.StockMovementType
member.summary: Classifies the reason for a stock quantity change.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.StockMovementType.Inbound
member.summary: Stock arrived from a supplier or purchase order.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.StockMovementType.Consumed
member.summary: Stock was consumed during production.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.StockMovementType.OffcutCreated
member.summary: An offcut was created from a cutting operation and added to stock.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.StockMovementType.Scrapped
member.summary: Stock was scrapped due to damage or quality failure.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.StockMovementType.Adjusted
member.summary: Stock quantity was manually corrected (e.g. after stock count).

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.StockMovementType.Returned
member.summary: Stock was returned from production back to the warehouse.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.StockReferenceType
member.summary: Identifies the type of external document that caused a stock movement.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.StockReferenceType.CuttingSheet
member.summary: Movement originated from a cutting sheet execution.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.StockReferenceType.PurchaseOrder
member.summary: Movement originated from a purchase order delivery.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.StockReferenceType.Manual
member.summary: Movement was recorded manually without an external reference.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.StockReferenceType.StockCount
member.summary: Movement resulted from a physical stock count correction.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Enums.StockReferenceType.Return
member.summary: Movement is a return from production to the warehouse.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.LowStockAlert
member.summary: Raised when a material's stock level falls at or below the configured reorder threshold.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.LowStockAlert.MaterialCode
member.summary: Gets the material code whose stock is low.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.LowStockAlert.CurrentQuantity
member.summary: Gets the current available quantity at the time the alert was raised.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.LowStockAlert.ThresholdQuantity
member.summary: Gets the configured minimum threshold that triggered the alert.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.OffcutRegistered
member.summary: Raised when a cutting offcut has been registered as a reusable stock item.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.OffcutRegistered.OffcutId
member.summary: Gets the new stock item identifier assigned to the offcut.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.OffcutRegistered.MaterialCode
member.summary: Gets the material code of the offcut panel.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.OffcutRegistered.Width
member.summary: Gets the width of the offcut in millimetres.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.OffcutRegistered.Height
member.summary: Gets the height of the offcut in millimetres.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.ReservationConsumed
member.summary: Published when a reservation is fully consumed via RecordConsumptionAsync.
member.remarks: Consumers MUST verify Event.TenantId matches their JWT TenantId (SEC-03).

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.ReservationConsumed.ReservationId
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the consumed reservation.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.ReservationConsumed.CorrelationId
member.summary: Gets the consumer-provided idempotency key of the consumed reservation.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.ReservationConsumed.ConsumerModule
member.summary: Gets the registered consumer module that consumed the reservation.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.ReservationExpired
member.summary: Published when a reservation expires because its TTL elapsed without consumption.
member.remarks: Consumers MUST verify Event.TenantId matches their JWT TenantId (SEC-03).

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.ReservationExpired.ReservationId
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the expired reservation.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.ReservationExpired.CorrelationId
member.summary: Gets the consumer-provided idempotency key of the expired reservation.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.ReservationExpired.ExpiredAt
member.summary: Gets the UTC timestamp at which the reservation expired.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.ReservationReleased
member.summary: Published when an active reservation is explicitly released by the consumer.
member.remarks: Consumers MUST verify Event.TenantId matches their JWT TenantId (SEC-03).

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.ReservationReleased.ReservationId
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the released reservation.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.ReservationReleased.CorrelationId
member.summary: Gets the consumer-provided idempotency key of the released reservation.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.ReservationReleased.Reason
member.summary: Gets the optional reason provided by the consumer at release time.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.StockConsumed
member.summary: Raised when stock has been consumed and the inventory ledger has been updated.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.StockConsumed.MaterialCode
member.summary: Gets the material code of the consumed stock.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.StockConsumed.Quantity
member.summary: Gets the number of units consumed.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.StockConsumed.ReferenceType
member.summary: Gets the type of the document that triggered consumption.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.StockConsumed.ReferenceId
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the triggering document, if available.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.StockReceived
member.summary: Raised when inbound stock has been recorded in the inventory system.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.StockReceived.MaterialCode
member.summary: Gets the material code of the received stock.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.StockReceived.Quantity
member.summary: Gets the number of units received.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.StockReceived.DeliveryReference
member.summary: Gets the supplier delivery reference number, if available.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.StockReserved
member.summary: Published when a soft stock reservation is successfully created.
member.remarks: Consumers MUST verify Event.TenantId matches their JWT TenantId (SEC-03).

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.StockReserved.ActorUserId
member.summary: Gets the user identity that created the reservation, if available.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.StockReserved.CorrelationId
member.summary: Gets the consumer-provided idempotency key.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.StockReserved.ReservationId
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the new reservation.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.StockReserved.ConsumerModule
member.summary: Gets the registered consumer module name.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.StockReserved.ExpiresAt
member.summary: Gets the UTC timestamp after which the reservation will expire.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Events.StockReserved.Items
member.summary: Gets the reserved line items.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.IInventoryProvider
member.summary: Contract for inventory/stock management. v1.2.0 — Reservation capability added (). TenantId resolved from JWT — not in request parameters (SEC-01).

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.IInventoryProvider.GetStockAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all stock items for the given material code. Requires capability.
member.returns: List of matching stock items.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.IInventoryProvider.GetUsableOffcutsAsync(System.String,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns offcut stock items that meet minimum size requirements. Requires capability.
member.returns: List of usable offcut items meeting the size constraints.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.IInventoryProvider.RecordConsumptionAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.DTOs.StockMovementDto},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Records one or more stock consumption movements.
member.param: List of stock movements to record.
member.returns: Success or failure result.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.IInventoryProvider.RecordOffcutAsync(SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Cutting.DTOs.CuttingOffcutResultDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Registers a cutting offcut as a reusable stock item.
member.param: Offcut data produced by the cutting provider.
member.returns: The new stock item identifier on success.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.IInventoryProvider.RecordInboundAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Requests.InboundReceiptDto},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Records one or more inbound deliveries.
member.param: List of items received from a delivery.
member.returns: Success or failure result.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.IInventoryProvider.GetConsumptionTrendAsync(System.String,System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns consumption trend data for a material over a time window. Requires capability.
member.returns: Consumption trend data on success.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.IInventoryProvider.ReserveAsync(SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Requests.ReserveStockRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a soft stock reservation with a TTL. Idempotent on (TenantId, CorrelationId) for Active reservations only — terminal state reservations do not block new ones. Requires capability.

remarks.para: TTL range: 1 hour to 168 hours (7 days). Default enforced by tenant configuration.
SEC-07 / SEC-09 — ConsumerContextJson policy: TRUSTED ONLY. NO user input, NO PII, NO secrets. Schema validated on ingest.
SEC-13 — ConsumerModule allowlist: Must be registered via IModuleRegistry.
Rate limit: 100 requests per minute per tenant. Exceeding returns 429 with Retry-After.

member.param: Reservation request containing items, TTL, and correlation ID.
member.returns: The created (or idempotently returned) reservation on success.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.IInventoryProvider.ReleaseReservationAsync(System.Guid,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Releases an active reservation identified by its correlation ID. No-op if the reservation is already Released, Expired, or Consumed. Rate limit: 100 requests per minute per tenant.
member.param: Consumer-provided correlation ID of the reservation to release.
Optional reason for releasing the reservation.
member.returns: Success result. NotFound if no active reservation matches the correlation ID.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.IInventoryProvider.GetReservationsAsync(SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.DTOs.ReservationFilter,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Queries reservations by filter criteria. At least one filter property must be set (DoS guard). Maximum Take is 500. Rate limit: 60 requests per minute per tenant.
member.param: Filter criteria. Must have at least one non-default property set.
member.returns: Matching reservations with their items.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Requests.InboundReceiptDto
member.summary: Input DTO for recording inbound stock from a supplier delivery. No TenantId — resolved from JWT (SEC-01). MaterialCode: max 20 chars. QualityNote: max 2000 chars.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Requests.InboundReceiptDto.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Input DTO for recording inbound stock from a supplier delivery. No TenantId — resolved from JWT (SEC-01). MaterialCode: max 20 chars. QualityNote: max 2000 chars.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Requests.ReserveStockRequest
member.summary: Request to create a soft stock reservation with a TTL. TenantId is NOT included — it is resolved from the JWT by the implementation (SEC-01). ConsumerContextJson MUST NOT contain PII or user-supplied content (SEC-07, SEC-09). CorrelationId: consumer-generated idempotency key; unique per active reservation per tenant. ConsumerModule: registered consumer module name; must be in the allowlist (SEC-13); max 50 characters. ConsumerContextJson: optional structured metadata from the consumer — TRUSTED ONLY, no PII, no user input. Items: line items to reserve; must contain at least one item (I-01); max 200 items. Ttl: reservation lifetime; must be between 1 hour and 168 hours (I-02, I-03).

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Requests.ReserveStockRequest.#ctor(System.Guid,System.String,System.Text.Json.JsonDocument,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Requests.ReserveItemRequest},System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Request to create a soft stock reservation with a TTL. TenantId is NOT included — it is resolved from the JWT by the implementation (SEC-01). ConsumerContextJson MUST NOT contain PII or user-supplied content (SEC-07, SEC-09). CorrelationId: consumer-generated idempotency key; unique per active reservation per tenant. ConsumerModule: registered consumer module name; must be in the allowlist (SEC-13); max 50 characters. ConsumerContextJson: optional structured metadata from the consumer — TRUSTED ONLY, no PII, no user input. Items: line items to reserve; must contain at least one item (I-01); max 200 items. Ttl: reservation lifetime; must be between 1 hour and 168 hours (I-02, I-03).

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Requests.ReserveItemRequest
member.summary: A single line item within a . StockItemId: identifier of the stock item to reserve. MaterialCode: material code of the stock item; max 20 characters. QuantityReserved: quantity to reserve; must be greater than zero (I-06).

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Requests.ReserveItemRequest.#ctor(System.Guid,System.String,System.Decimal)
member.summary: A single line item within a . StockItemId: identifier of the stock item to reserve. MaterialCode: material code of the stock item; max 20 characters. QuantityReserved: quantity to reserve; must be greater than zero (I-06).

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Validation.ConsumerContextJsonSchema
member.summary: Shared validation patterns for ConsumerContextJson (SEC-07, SEC-09). Implementations MUST apply all three layers: schema check, XSS regex, PII regex. TRUSTED ONLY — no user input, no PII, no secrets permitted.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Validation.ConsumerContextJsonSchema.MaxSizeBytes
member.summary: Maximum allowed byte size of the serialised ConsumerContextJson payload (4 KB).

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Validation.ConsumerContextJsonSchema.MaxDepth
member.summary: Maximum allowed nesting depth of the JSON document.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Validation.ConsumerContextJsonSchema.XssPattern
member.summary: XSS and script-injection pattern (SEC-07, Layer 2). Rejects payloads containing HTML tags, javascript: or data: URIs, or inline event handlers.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Validation.ConsumerContextJsonSchema.PiiPattern
member.summary: PII detection pattern (SEC-09, Layer 2). Rejects payloads that appear to contain e-mail addresses or bearer token strings.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Inventory.Validation.ConsumerContextJsonSchema.IsValid(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Validates the raw JSON string against XSS and PII patterns. Returns true when the content is safe to store; false otherwise.
member.param: Serialised JSON payload to validate. May be null or empty.
Set to the name of the first violated pattern, or null when valid.
member.returns: True if the payload passes all checks; false if a violation is found.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.DTOs.DeliveryDto
member.summary: Represents a physical delivery received against a purchase order.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.DTOs.DeliveryDto.#ctor(System.Guid,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.DTOs.DeliveryLineDto})
member.summary: Represents a physical delivery received against a purchase order.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.DTOs.DeliveryLineDto
member.summary: Represents a single line of an actual delivery against a purchase order line. QualityNote: max 2000 chars.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.DTOs.DeliveryLineDto.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Represents a single line of an actual delivery against a purchase order line. QualityNote: max 2000 chars.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.DTOs.PriceListEntryDto
member.summary: A single entry from a supplier's current price list for a material. Currency: ISO 4217 format (e.g. HUF, EUR, USD). MinimumQuantity: null if no minimum order quantity required.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.DTOs.PriceListEntryDto.#ctor(System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.Decimal,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset})
member.summary: A single entry from a supplier's current price list for a material. Currency: ISO 4217 format (e.g. HUF, EUR, USD). MinimumQuantity: null if no minimum order quantity required.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.DTOs.PurchaseOrderDto
member.summary: Output DTO representing a complete purchase order. TenantId present as read-only (SEC-01 output side). Notes: max 2000 chars.
Output DTO representing a complete purchase order. TenantId present as read-only (SEC-01 output side). Notes: max 2000 chars.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.DTOs.PurchaseOrderLineDto
member.summary: Represents a single line item within a purchase order. Currency: ISO 4217, max 3 chars (CD-08).

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.DTOs.PurchaseOrderLineDto.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Decimal},System.String)
member.summary: Represents a single line item within a purchase order. Currency: ISO 4217, max 3 chars (CD-08).

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.DTOs.SupplierDto
member.summary: Supplier master data record.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.DTOs.SupplierDto.#ctor(System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Supplier master data record.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.DTOs.SupplierRatingDto
member.summary: Aggregated performance rating for a supplier based on historical order data. DeliveryAccuracy, QualityScore, PriceCompetitiveness: scores in range 0 to 1.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.DTOs.SupplierRatingDto.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Aggregated performance rating for a supplier based on historical order data. DeliveryAccuracy, QualityScore, PriceCompetitiveness: scores in range 0 to 1.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.Enums.PurchaseOrderStatus
member.summary: Represents the lifecycle state of a purchase order.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.Enums.PurchaseOrderStatus.Draft
member.summary: Order is being prepared and has not been sent to the supplier.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.Enums.PurchaseOrderStatus.Submitted
member.summary: Order has been submitted to the supplier.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.Enums.PurchaseOrderStatus.Confirmed
member.summary: Supplier has confirmed the order and delivery date.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.Enums.PurchaseOrderStatus.Shipped
member.summary: Order has been dispatched by the supplier.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.Enums.PurchaseOrderStatus.Delivered
member.summary: Goods have been received and the order is complete.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.Enums.PurchaseOrderStatus.Cancelled
member.summary: Order has been cancelled before delivery.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.Events.DeliveryReceived
member.summary: Raised when a physical delivery has been recorded against a purchase order.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.Events.DeliveryReceived.OrderId
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the purchase order that was fulfilled.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.Events.DeliveryReceived.DeliveryId
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the created delivery record.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.Events.PurchaseOrderCreated
member.summary: Raised when a new purchase order has been successfully created.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.Events.PurchaseOrderCreated.OrderId
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the newly created purchase order.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.Events.PurchaseOrderCreated.SupplierId
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the supplier the order was placed with.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.Events.ReorderAlertReceived
member.summary: Raised when the procurement system has detected that a material needs to be reordered.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.Events.ReorderAlertReceived.MaterialCode
member.summary: Gets the material code that needs reordering.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.Events.ReorderAlertReceived.CurrentQuantity
member.summary: Gets the current stock quantity at the time the alert was generated.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.Events.ReorderAlertReceived.SuggestedQuantity
member.summary: Gets the suggested order quantity based on consumption trends and lead time.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.IProcurementProvider
member.summary: Contract for procurement/purchasing. TenantId resolved from JWT — not in request parameters (SEC-01).

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.IProcurementProvider.CreatePurchaseOrderAsync(SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.Requests.CreatePurchaseOrderRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new purchase order. Requires capability.
member.returns: The new purchase order identifier on success.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.IProcurementProvider.GetPurchaseOrderAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a purchase order by its identifier.
member.returns: The purchase order DTO on success.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.IProcurementProvider.GetPricesAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the current price list entries for a material across all suppliers. Requires capability.
member.param: Material code to query prices for.
member.returns: All active price list entries for the material.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.IProcurementProvider.RecordDeliveryAsync(SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.DTOs.DeliveryDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Records a physical delivery against an existing purchase order.
member.param: Delivery details including line-by-line received quantities.
member.returns: Success or failure result.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.IProcurementProvider.GetSupplierRatingAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the aggregated performance rating for a supplier. Requires capability.
member.param: Identifier of the supplier to rate.
member.returns: The supplier rating on success.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.Requests.CreatePurchaseOrderRequest
member.summary: Input DTO for creating a new purchase order. No TenantId — resolved from JWT (SEC-01). Lines must contain at least one entry. Notes: max 2000 chars.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.Requests.CreatePurchaseOrderRequest.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Procurement.DTOs.PurchaseOrderLineDto},System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset},System.String)
member.summary: Input DTO for creating a new purchase order. No TenantId — resolved from JWT (SEC-01). Lines must contain at least one entry. Notes: max 2000 chars.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.IModuleProvider
member.summary: Base interface for all module providers (cutting, inventory, procurement). Every implementation MUST return within 5s on HealthCheckAsync — timeout = false. Consumer MUST verify Capabilities before calling optional methods.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.IModuleProvider.ProviderName
member.summary: Gets the unique name identifying this provider implementation.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.IModuleProvider.Capabilities
member.summary: Gets the composite set of capabilities this provider supports.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.IModuleProvider.HealthCheckAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks whether the provider is healthy and ready to serve requests. Implementations MUST respond within 5 seconds.
member.returns: true if the provider is healthy; otherwise false.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.ModuleEvent
member.summary: Base record for all module events. EventId is auto-generated on construction. CONSUMER MUST verify that TenantId matches the current JWT TenantId claim (SEC-03).

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.ModuleEvent.EventId
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier for this event instance, auto-generated on construction.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.ModuleEvent.TenantId
member.summary: Gets the tenant that owns this event. Must match the JWT TenantId claim (SEC-03).

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.ModuleEvent.OccurredAt
member.summary: Gets the UTC timestamp when this event occurred.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.ProviderCapability
member.summary: Composite capability flags for module providers. Consumer MUST check HasFlag before calling optional methods (SEC-05). If provider claims capability but doesn't implement it, throw NotSupportedException.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.ProviderCapability.None
member.summary: No capabilities declared.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.ProviderCapability.CuttingSubmit
member.summary: Provider supports submitting cutting sheets.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.ProviderCapability.CuttingNesting
member.summary: Provider supports nesting optimization.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.ProviderCapability.CuttingExecution
member.summary: Provider supports execution tracking.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.ProviderCapability.CuttingWaste
member.summary: Provider supports waste reporting.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.ProviderCapability.InventoryStock
member.summary: Provider supports stock queries.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.ProviderCapability.InventoryOffcut
member.summary: Provider supports offcut management.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.ProviderCapability.InventoryTrend
member.summary: Provider supports consumption trend analysis.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.ProviderCapability.InventoryLocation
member.summary: Provider supports stock location queries.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.ProviderCapability.ProcurementOrder
member.summary: Provider supports purchase order creation.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.ProviderCapability.ProcurementPricing
member.summary: Provider supports supplier price list queries.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.ProviderCapability.ProcurementRating
member.summary: Provider supports supplier rating queries.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.ProviderCapability.InventoryReservation
member.summary: Provider supports soft stock reservation with TTL (v1.2.0).

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.ProviderCapability.CuttingAnonymous
member.summary: Provider supports anonymous/unauthenticated cutting sheet submission (v1.3.0). Required for FreeTier and PartnerTier flows. Consumer MUST check this flag before calling SubmitAnonymousSheetAsync (SEC-05).

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.SourceChannel
member.summary: Identifies the channel through which a request entered the system. Used for audit trail, RBAC differentiation, and rate-limit policies. v1.3.0 — introduced for FreeTier/PartnerTier extension points.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.SourceChannel.Direct
member.summary: Authenticated tenant user via Portal or BFF.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.SourceChannel.FreeTier
member.summary: Anonymous workspace (FreeTier) — no tenant context, rate-limited by IP/session.

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.SourceChannel.Partner
member.summary: B2B2C embedded flow via partner integration (PartnerTier).

member.name: F:SpaceOS.Modules.Contracts.Shared.SourceChannel.Api
member.summary: Programmatic ERP/API integration (future).
